appSlogan: The Ultimate Proving Ground for the 'Chosen One'
metaDescription: Step into the most prestigious warzone in basketball history to calibrate the credibility of the 'Chosen One'.
loginToVoteHint: Sign in to vote and get your battle card
loadingVerdictGrace: High-quality export takes time; the first run after idle can take 1–3 minutes. Keep this page open.
completeProfileFirst: Complete your profile to join the vote.
claimYourWarzoneDesc: Choose your warzone to cast your vote and join the battle report.
deepLinkWarzoneSwitched: Switched to {{warzone}} based on your link.
deepLinkWarzoneSwitchedLbj: Switched to the LBJ main warzone based on your link.
error_warzoneRequired: Warzone (team) is required. Complete profile setup first.
thanksVoted: Thanks for your stance. Data will be included in global stats.
security_verified_hint: 🛡️ Secured via Device ID & App Integrity Check
security_verified_hint_audit: 🛡️ Running secure audit & logging. Please do not close this page.
submitErrorPermissionDenied: Permission denied. Try signing out and back in, or ask the admin to deploy Firestore rules.
voteError_authRequired: Please sign in first so your vote carries full credibility.
voteError_lowScoreRobot: To prevent bot voting, this security check was stricter and your vote was not accepted. If you are human, stay on this page for a few seconds, scroll a bit, then tap the Cast your vote button again.
voteError_deviceAlreadyVoted: Device locked. One device, one ultimate verdict.
voteError_fingerprintRecentVote: This device already voted in this warzone within 24 hours (possibly on another account).
voteError_adNotWatched: Resetting stance requires a rewarded ad. Please watch the ad to completion.
voteError_resetInternal: System busy. Please try again later.
voteError_voteInternal: Vote service busy. Please try again later.
revoteError: Reset failed. Please reload the page.
revoteSignatureError: Security check failed. Set VITE_GOAT_GOLDEN_KEY_SECRET to match the backend and rebuild.
exitModalMessage: Press back again or click below to exit The GOAT Meter.
exitBattlefieldWarning: Press back again to leave the battlefield
privacyPageSubtitle: Store-aligned transparency. No login required to read.
privacyIntro: This Privacy Policy describes how The GOAT Meter collects, uses, stores, and protects your data. We are committed to ensuring your privacy and compliance with app store standards. By using the app, you agree to this policy.
privacyCollectionLead: We may collect the following data and request these permissions:

privacyCollectionItems.title: Account & Identity:
privacyCollectionItems.body: When signing in with Google, we receive your display name, email, and a UID from Firebase Authentication. To optimize sharing, we may mirror your profile picture to our secure cloud storage.

privacyCollectionItems.title: Geolocation:
privacyCollectionItems.body: To ensure regional poll integrity and assign you to a “Warzone,” we request access to your Precise Location (GPS). If denied, we fallback to Approximate Location (via IP address).

privacyCollectionItems.title: Media & Storage:
privacyCollectionItems.body: We request Photo Gallery/Storage permissions when you choose to save a “Battle Card” to your device or customize your avatar. We only access files directly related to these functions.

privacyCollectionItems.title: In-App Data:
privacyCollectionItems.body: Includes your chosen warzone, age range, gender, country/region, and your voting stance and reasons.

privacyCollectionItems.title: Device Identifiers:
privacyCollectionItems.body: We use a unique deviceId to enforce a “one-vote-per-device” rule to prevent poll manipulation. This is not used for cross-app tracking.

privacyPurposeLead: We use the data above to:
privacyPurposeItems: Authenticate users and manage personalized settings;
Assign Warzones based on geographic location and generate region-specific Battle Cards;
Prevent automated abuse and duplicate voting to maintain poll integrity;
Display relevant advertisements provided by Google AdMob within the app.
privacyThirdPartyLead: We partner with the following trusted services to process technical data:

privacyThirdPartyItems.title: Google Firebase & AdMob:
privacyThirdPartyItems.body: Handles authentication, database storage, security checks (App Check), and ad delivery. Your account data is stored on Google’s encrypted servers.

privacyThirdPartyItems.title: Geocoding Services:
privacyThirdPartyItems.body: We use OpenStreetMap (Nominatim) and professional IP geolocation services for regional assignment; these services only receive anonymous coordinates or IP addresses.

privacySecurityRightsLead: We use Firebase App Check and other measures to protect your data. You may at any time:
privacySecurityRightsItems: Delete your account and all associated voting records and profile data via the “Danger Zone” in the app’s Settings;
Request data access or correction by contacting us.
privacySectionRetentionContent: Upon account deletion, all personal data and voting history associated with your account will be permanently removed or anonymized on our servers. Some anonymized aggregate data may be retained where required by law or for legitimate operational needs.
privacySectionContactContent: If you have questions about this policy or our data practices, please contact us via the in-app support channels or the developer contact information listed on our Google Play Store page.
dangerZoneDesc: Once deleted, your profile and vote history cannot be recovered.
deleteConfirmDesc: This cannot be undone. All profile and vote data will be removed.
exportFailedNetworkAdvice: Your connection is unstable, so some assets may not have loaded fully. Move to a spot with better signal and try again.
exportFailedNativeRenderAnomalyAdvice: Your network connection is unstable (Primary Cause), which caused an error in the phone's temporary cache. Even if you move to a better spot, please 【Close and Restart the App】 and connect to a stable Wi-Fi before trying again.
exportFailedSavePhotoAdvice: The battle report was generated, but saving to your gallery failed. Please check photo/storage permissions and try again.
galleryPermissionDesc: Allow photo/gallery access to save your battle report.
needPhotoPermissionToSave: To save the battle report to your gallery, allow Photos / media access in system settings.
exportFailedUnknown: Battle report generation failed due to an unknown error. Please screenshot this message and contact support.
err_pixelcopy_bounds: The card position is out of the visible screen area. Please move the card to the center manually and try again.
err_pixelcopy_timeout: System rendering timed out. Please check device performance or disable battery saver.
err_pixelcopy_oom: Not enough memory on the phone. Please close other background apps and try again.
exportSlowResources: Network is slow; loading high-res assets…
resetStanceConfirmDesc: You can choose a new stance and reasons. Your previous vote will be removed.
resetProfileOption: Also reset profile (age, gender, team, etc.)
breakingVoteSignatureError: Security check failed. Refresh the page and try again.
breakingAlreadyVoted: You have already voted on this topic
breakingTeaser: {{count}} have participated — cast your stance to see live results
arenaDeclaration: The King's Verdict: Define the legacy. Your stance is the final record of history.
breakingCommitmentMessage: Your stance will be recorded in the archive. Once saved, it cannot be changed. Confirm this vote?
loadErrorTryAgain: Failed to load data. Please try again.
sentimentError_authRequired: Sign in to use filtered intel; funnel stats require a verified server request.
sentimentError_functionsNotReady: Cloud Functions are not ready. Refresh the page or check your network and project settings.
mapLegend: Gold = support · Purple = oppose · Click country to filter
loginPromptDesc: Sign in to vote and get your battle card.
completeWarzonePromptDesc: Fill in your display name, country, and stance to join the vote.
disclaimerCommunity: This app is a community-driven project and is not affiliated with the NBA or any professional athletes.
deleteAccountHintSetup: To delete your account and vote data, go to the Vote page and open Settings → Danger Zone.
unlockAnalystDesc: Get analyst access for breakdowns by country, team, and age.
intelGateDesc: Advanced data requires intel energy. Watch a video to get scan access for this session.
energyExhausted: Your intel energy is depleted. Watch another rewarded video to recharge and keep exploring.
analystGateExpiryDisclaimer: Tactical intel remains valid for 10 minutes of inactivity.
analystGateAdDisclaimer: Rewarded ads only unlock charts and advanced intel. Your existing GOAT votes are not affected.
noUserForDelete: No current user. Please sign in first.
authError_firebaseNotReady: Firebase is not configured or failed to initialize. Check .env settings.
authError_configNotFound: Firebase Auth is not set up. Enable Authentication (Google sign-in) in Firebase Console and confirm .env matches the project.
authError_unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized. Add it in Firebase Console > Authentication > Settings > Authorized domains (e.g. localhost).
authError_popupClosed: Sign-in window was closed. Please try again or use redirect sign-in if popups are blocked.
authError_popupBlocked: Sign-in popup was blocked. Allow popups or use redirect sign-in.
authError_requiresRecentLogin: This action requires recent sign-in. Please sign in again in the popup and retry.
authError_refererBlocked: Sign-in blocked (referer localhost). In Google Cloud Console, add https://localhost and https://localhost/* to the API key's allowed HTTP referrers. See docs/APK_GOOGLE_LOGIN_FIX.md.
error_profileNotFoundRevote: Profile not found. Cannot reset vote.

battleCard.disclaimer: This is a fan-made analytics project. Not affiliated with the NBA or its teams.
battleCard.mirror_image_alt: Exported high-resolution battle report preview; long-press to save or share.

recaptchaDisclosure: This site is protected by reCAPTCHA and the Google <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and <terms>Terms of Service</terms> apply.
recaptchaDisclosureAria: reCAPTCHA disclosure and links to Google Privacy Policy and Terms of Service
adminImageDrop: Drop image here or click to upload
adminSavedNoImage: Saved. Image upload failed (check Storage CORS for localhost).
breakingAdNotice: This scan requires intel energy. Watch a short clip for voting authorization.
breakingFirstVoteFreeHint: 🛡️ First Strike: Warzone authorization granted for free.
